full_text:
Sample ID: S119_pOme

Cell count:

total: 4.65 E6

live: E6

viability: 36.9 %

size: 7.5 um

Total cell count: 4.525 e6 / ml

! Pre-coat all the wells with omentum-gel:

10 uL for 48-well plates !

A) RNA/DNA extraction + FFPE sample (4 drops):

48-well plate

DNA/RNA + FFPE: 34 wells x 40 µl x = 1360 µl

1500 cells/µl = 2.04E6 cells

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 680 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 225µl

cells in medium → 341.4

ome-gel → 96 µl

aprotinin → 2.0 µl

thrombin → 2.0 µl

fibrinogen → 13.6 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

B) Drug treatment for flow:

48-well plate

9 conditions x 6 wells/condition = 54 wells

54 wells x 40 µl = 2160 µl,

1500 cells/µl = 3.24E6 cells

→ make 3 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 720 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 240µl

cells in medium → 359.2

ome-gel → 102 µl

aprotinin → 2.2 µl

thrombin → 2.2 µl

fibrinogen → 14.4 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 300 uL medium

total: 4.43 E6

live: E6

viability: 30.5 %

size: 7.4 um

C) Drug treatment for IF:

96-well U plate

9 conditions x 8 wells/condition= 72 wells

72 wells x 10 µl = 720 µl

1500 cells/µl = 1.08E6 cells

→ make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorf

volume to take from cell suspension: 240µl

cells in medium → 359.2 uL

ome-gel → 102 µl

aprotinin →2.2 µl

thrombin → 2.2 µl

fibrinogen → 14.4 µl

→ Let it solidify for 30 min - add 150 uL medium

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 3.0E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer

670 µl

E) Sample for cryo

→ Collect cells per 1 mL stemcell banker

Omegel for the coating:

76 wells x 10 uL = ~800 uL

medium → 667 µl

ome-gel → 113 µl

aprotinin → 2.4 µl

thrombin → 2.4 µl

fibrinogen → 16 µl

Prepare:

Medium

needed 350 uL x 34 = 11.9 mL

42 x 300 uL = 12.6 mL

56 x 150 uL = 8.4 mL

sum ~ 40 mL

Omegel needed ~ 610 uL

aprotinin = 13 uL

thrombin = 13 uL

fibrinogen = 86 uL

Notes from the culturing:

No coating done. Number of cells per uL was reduced from 2000 to 1500, since inthe last three experiments cells have overoccupied the volume of the drop bery soon. Note, This time there were more single cells than last time. This should be somehow be troubleshoot to have enough of multicellular clusters on day 1 but not have them overcrowded.

For the 96-well plate there was no coating done since the height would cause problems for imaging.

Antti Hassinen (FIMM-HCA) said that U clear bottom is optically very good and therefore this is the format used now. For these wells 8 uL seemed too little, so at the end the volume of the drops was raised to 10 uL. Originally the 8 uL was designed for 96 flat bottom plates. IF plan: CD45 / cl-PARP or cl-casp3-7 / CK7.

Drug treatments:

Plate 1 and 2

DMSO -control

Berzosertib (ATRi) - 20nm

Berzosertib (ATRi) - 100nm

Berzosertib (ATRi) - 1um

Ziritaxestat(ATXi) - 0.13 um

Ziritaxestat(ATXi) - 0.2um

Ziritaxestat(ATXi) - 0.7um

Berzosertib + Ziritaxestat - 20nm + 0.13um

Berzosertib + Ziritaxestat - 100nm + 0.2um

Berzosertib + Ziritaxestat - 1um + 0.2um

Olaparib - 20uM

Pembrolizumab - 10ug/ml

Olaparib + Pembrolizumab - 20um + 10ug/ml

Plate layout (48-well plate):

Treatment:

Next day, prepare 7x concentrated drug working solution

Add 50 uL of the drug per 300 uL medium on 48 well plate

Add 25 of the drug per 150 uL medium on 96 well plate

For S119_pOme:

x on 48 well plate = 6 x 50 uL = 300 uL

x on 96 well plate = 8 x 25 uL = 200 uL

(!) c1v1 = c2v2 -> c1 x 10 uL = c2 x v2
